thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.BadSubdomainLength

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.AuctionNotStarted
thrown_errors.description: Domain item auction has not started yet.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.DomainTooShort
thrown_errors.description: Domain label is too short.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.DomainTooLong
thrown_errors.description: Domain label is too long.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.BadDomainLength
thrown_errors.description: Domain label length is not byte-aligned.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.BadDomainString
thrown_errors.description: Domain label contains an invalid character.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.AmountBelowMinimum
thrown_errors.description: Incoming amount is below the current minimum price.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.DomainReservedByConfig
thrown_errors.description: Domain is already blocked by DNS config.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.InvalidWorkchain
thrown_errors.description: Address workchain is not basechain.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.UnauthorizedTransfer
thrown_errors.description: Transfer sender is not the current owner.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.InsufficientRestAmount
thrown_errors.description: Remaining balance after storage, forward amount, and fees would be negative.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.UnauthorizedCollectionInit
thrown_errors.description: Initialization sender is not the DNS collection.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.UnauthorizedFillUp
thrown_errors.description: Owner-only top-up attempted by another sender after auction end.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.BidTooSmall
thrown_errors.description: Bid or expired-domain release amount is too small.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.UnauthorizedEditContent
thrown_errors.description: Content replacement sender is not the current owner.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.UnauthorizedChangeDns
thrown_errors.description: DNS record change sender is not the current owner.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.BadContentTag
thrown_errors.description: Content cell is not the expected on-chain DNS content shape.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.BadDnsPrecondition
thrown_errors.description: Governance/action precondition failed, or `dnsresolve` subdomain did not start with zero byte.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.CannotReleaseBalance
thrown_errors.description: Domain cannot be released yet.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.GovernanceConfigNotFound
thrown_errors.description: Governance config entry for this domain was not found.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.UnsupportedGovernanceOp
thrown_errors.description: Governance config opcode is unsupported.

thrown_errors.name: DnsDomainItemErrors.UnsupportedOperation
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal message opcode is not supported.

thrown_errors.description: NFT ownership assignment attempted after the auction already has an owner.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.InvalidOpExpectOwnershipAssigned
thrown_errors.description: NFT-originated activation body is not `ownership_assigned`.

thrown_errors.description: Marketplace emergency proxy is not allowed while a normal active auction can still proceed.

thrown_errors.description: Auction was already cancelled, force-closed, or settled.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AlreadyActivated
thrown_errors.description: Jetton wallet update attempted after the one-time public key was consumed or absent.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.NotEnoughTons
thrown_errors.description: Attached TON value is below the command-specific processing budget.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AlreadyHasBid
thrown_errors.description: Cancellation or Jetton wallet update is blocked after a bid exists.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionInProgress
thrown_errors.description: Finish attempted before end time.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.BadEmergencySendMode
thrown_errors.description: Marketplace emergency proxy tried to use send mode bit 32.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.LastBidTooClose
thrown_errors.description: Marketplace emergency proxy was attempted too close to the end time or last bid time.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionDurationTooLong
thrown_errors.description: Auction duration is more than 20 days from the current time.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionHasNotBeenActivatedYet
thrown_errors.description: Bid, cancel, or finish attempted before NFT ownership assignment activated the auction.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionIsInABrokenState
thrown_errors.description: Fee math or Jetton setup marks the auction as broken.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.WrongCurrency
thrown_errors.description: TON bid sent to Jetton auction, Jetton bid sent to TON auction, or wrong Jetton wallet sent notification.

thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal or external opcode is not recognized.

declarations.name: StateInit
declarations.description:
`StateInit` is a "canonical TL/B representation from block.tlb" of a contract initial state.
But for everyday tasks, it's too complicated. It is not used in practice.
To represent code+data, consider [ContractState].
To represent sharding (fixedPrefixLength, formerly splitDepth), consider [AutoDeployAddress].

fields.name: reserve1

fields.name: collectedToken1ProtocolFee

fields.name: lpFee
fields.description: Liquidity pool fee value; fee ratio is this value divided by `params::fee_divider` (10000).

fields.name: protocolFee
fields.description: Protocol fee value; fee ratio is this value divided by `params::fee_divider` (10000).

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.InsufficientProvideWalletAddressValue
thrown_errors.description: `provide_wallet_address` message value cannot cover the response budget.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.ZeroOutput
thrown_errors.description: Burn, collect, or liquidity flow would produce zero output.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.InvalidCaller
thrown_errors.description: Sender is not the deterministic LP Account, LP Wallet, Router, or protocol-fee address expected by the branch.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.InsufficientGas
thrown_errors.description: Attached value cannot cover the required downstream gas and forward fees.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.WrongWorkchain
thrown_errors.description: Sender, owner, receiver, or token wallet is outside the configured base workchain.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.WrongAddress
thrown_errors.description: Address value is not allowed for this branch, including non-none burn response address.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.LowLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Initial liquidity did not provide both token sides.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.InvalidAmount
thrown_errors.description: Reserve or LP supply update would leave an invalid amount.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.InvalidCall
thrown_errors.description: Branch is not valid in the current pool state.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.InvalidToken
thrown_errors.description: Stored token wallet addresses are identical.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.EmptyNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Pool does not accept empty internal message bodies.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2ConstProductErrors.UnsupportedOperation
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal message opcode is not supported by the selected sender branch.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.NoLiquidity

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.ZeroOutput
thrown_errors.description: Calculated output amount is zero.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.InvalidCaller
thrown_errors.description: Message sender is not the deterministic child contract expected by the Pool.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.InsufficientGas
thrown_errors.description: Attached value is below the required gas budget.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.WrongWorkchain
thrown_errors.description: Message address is outside the configured workchain.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.WrongAddress
thrown_errors.description: Message contains an address shape disallowed by the source path.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.LowLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Initial liquidity is below the required minimum.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.MathError
thrown_errors.description: Math helper reported an invalid calculation.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.InvalidAmount
thrown_errors.description: Amount or reserve invariant check failed.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.InvalidCall
thrown_errors.description: Call is invalid for the current Pool state.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.FeeOutOfRange
thrown_errors.description: Fee value is outside configured bounds.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.InvalidToken
thrown_errors.description: Token wallet pair is invalid.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.EmptyNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Empty internal message bodies are rejected.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.MaxInRatio
thrown_errors.description: Input amount exceeds the maximum ratio accepted by source math.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.EmptyCell
thrown_errors.description: Required cell data is empty.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.NotConverge
thrown_errors.description: StableSwap invariant iteration did not converge.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2StableswapErrors.WrongOperation
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal message opcode is not supported by the Pool.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.NoLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Liquidity-dependent operation had no usable pool or LP-account liquidity.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.ZeroOutput
thrown_errors.description: Computed output or supplied liquidity was zero.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidCaller
thrown_errors.description: Sender was not the deterministic router, LP account, LP wallet, or protocol-fee address expected by a branch.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InsufficientGas
thrown_errors.description: Attached TON value cannot cover the required forward/storage/gas budget.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.WrongWorkchain
thrown_errors.description: Address workchain does not match the configured basechain.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.WrongAddress
thrown_errors.description: Address field is invalid for the selected operation.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.LowLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Initial liquidity is below the required minimum or not both-sided.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.MathError
thrown_errors.description: Weighted math helper signaled an arithmetic failure.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidAmount
thrown_errors.description: Amount, reserve, or weighted parameter is outside accepted bounds.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidCall
thrown_errors.description: Operation is invalid for current pool/router upgrade state.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.FeeOutOfRange
thrown_errors.description: LP or protocol fee is outside configured bounds.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidToken
thrown_errors.description: Pool token wallet pair is invalid.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.EmptyNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Empty internal message body is rejected by the pool entrypoint.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.MaxInRatio
thrown_errors.description: Weighted swap input exceeds the max-in ratio.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.EmptyCell
thrown_errors.description: Required code cell is empty.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.WrongOp
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal opcode is not supported by the selected sender branch.

compilerAbi.author: STON.fi
compilerAbi.description: Curated low-level STON.fi DEX v2 Router ABI for getter methods, Jetton transfer payloads, admin operations, and Pool/Vault callbacks. Covers constant_product, stableswap, weighted_stableswap, and weighted_const_product router variants.

fields.name: isLocked
fields.description: True when `transfer_notification` operations are locked, blocking `swap` and `provide_lp` routing.

fields.name: adminAddress
fields.description: Contract admin account authorized to run Router governance operations.

fields.name: tempUpgrade
fields.description: Pending code, admin, and pool-code upgrade state; zero deadlines mean no pending upgrade.

fields.name: staticData
fields.description: Router id and contract code cells used for deterministic Pool, LP wallet/account, and Vault derivation.

fields.name: upgradePoolCode
fields.description: Finalized Pool code staged by pool-code upgrade finalization and forwarded by `update_pool_code`.

declarations.description: Persistent Router state stored in the root data cell and exposed by `get_router_data`.

fields.name: codeUpgradeDeadline

fields.name: adminUpgradeDeadline
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the pending admin upgrade may be finalized, or zero.

fields.name: poolCodeUpgradeDeadline
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the pending pool-code upgrade may be finalized, or zero.

fields.name: pendingAdminAddress
fields.description: Pending admin address; source stores `addr_none` when no admin upgrade is active.

fields.name: pendingRouterCode
fields.description: Pending router code cell, empty when no router-code upgrade is active.

fields.name: pendingPoolCode
fields.description: Pending pool code cell, empty when no pool-code upgrade is active.

fields.name: bid

fields.name: bidTs

fields.name: endTime

fields.name: maxBid

fields.name: minExtendTime

get_methods.name: get_nft_data
get_methods.description: Return item initialization flag, index, collection, owner, and individual content.

get_methods.name: get_full_domain
get_methods.description: Return full DNS domain slice as `domain + token_name + zero byte`.

get_methods.name: get_telemint_token_name
get_methods.description: Return the TeleMint token name, for example a Telegram username without `@`.

get_methods.name: get_telemint_auction_state
get_methods.description: Return active auction state; throws `NoAuction` when no auction is active.

get_methods.name: get_telemint_auction_config
get_methods.description: Return active auction configuration, or zero values with `addr_none` when no auction is active.

get_methods.name: royalty_params
get_methods.description: Return stored royalty parameters.

get_methods.name: dnsresolve
get_methods.description: Resolve a DNS subdomain/category pair through the item's DNS record dictionary.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.BadSubdomainLength
thrown_errors.description: DNS subdomain length is not byte-aligned.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.NotEnoughFunds
thrown_errors.description: Remaining balance after storage, forward amount, and fees would be negative.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.UnknownOp
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal message opcode is not supported.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.Uninitialized
thrown_errors.description: Item state is still uninitialized.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.TooSmallStake
thrown_errors.description: Bid is below the current minimum.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.ForbiddenNotDeploy
thrown_errors.description: Initialization message was not sent by the stored collection.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.ForbiddenNotStake
thrown_errors.description: Active auction accepts only plain zero-op bid transfers.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.ForbiddenTopup
thrown_errors.description: Top-up is allowed only from the current owner after auction end.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.ForbiddenTransfer
thrown_errors.description: Transfer is allowed only from the current owner.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.ForbiddenChangeDns
thrown_errors.description: DNS record changes are allowed only from the current owner.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.NoAuction
thrown_errors.description: No active auction exists.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.ForbiddenAuction
thrown_errors.description: Auction management is allowed only from the current owner.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.AlreadyHasStakes
thrown_errors.description: Auction cancellation is forbidden after bids have arrived.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.InvalidAuctionConfig
thrown_errors.description: Auction config violates source bounds.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.IncorrectWorkchain
thrown_errors.description: Address workchain is not zero.

thrown_errors.name: TelemintNftItemErrors.NoFirstZeroByte
thrown_errors.description: DNS subdomain does not start with the required zero byte.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigOrderV2Errors.UnauthorizedSign

thrown_errors.name: MultisigOrderV2Errors.AlreadyExecuted
thrown_errors.description: Approval attempted after execution was already sent.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigOrderV2Errors.UnknownOp
thrown_errors.description: Message opcode is neither init, approve, nor zero-op text comment `approve`.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.NotEnoughTon
thrown_errors.description: New-order message value is below the source-calculated order processing cost.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.UnauthorizedExecute
thrown_errors.description: Execution sender is neither the expected order contract nor self for internal execution.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.SignersOutdated
thrown_errors.description: Order signer dictionary hash or approval count is not current enough for execution.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.InvalidDictionarySequence
thrown_errors.description: Signer/proposer dictionary keys are not contiguous from zero.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.InconsistentData
thrown_errors.description: Stored signer count does not match the signer dictionary sequence length.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.InvalidThreshold
thrown_errors.description: Threshold is zero or greater than the signer count.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.InvalidSigners
thrown_errors.description: Signer dictionary is empty.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.Expired
thrown_errors.description: Order expiration timestamp is earlier than the current Unix timestamp.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.UnauthorizedNewOrder
thrown_errors.description: New-order sender is not the selected signer/proposer at the supplied index.

thrown_errors.name: MultisigV2Errors.InvalidNewOrder
thrown_errors.description: New-order seqno is neither the next seqno nor the all-ones auto-seqno marker.

compilerAbi.author: TON Core
compilerAbi.description: Curated Wallet V4 R1 interface

declarations.name: ExtraCurrenciesMap
declarations.description:
Other modes affect the fee calculation as follows:
+64 substitutes the entire balance of the incoming message as an outgoing value (slightly inaccurate, gas expenses that cannot be estimated before the computation is completed are not taken into account).
+128 substitutes the value of the entire balance of the contract before the start of the computation phase (slightly inaccurate, since gas expenses that cannot be estimated before the completion of the computation phase are not taken into account).
`ExtraCurrenciesMap` represents a dictionary of "extra currencies" other than TON coin.
They can be attached to a message (incoming and outgoing) and stored on contract's balance.
It's a dictionary `[currencyID => amount]` (amount is like `coins`, but encoded with a high precision).

declarations.name: StateInit
declarations.description:
`StateInit` is a "canonical TL/B representation from block.tlb" of a contract initial state.
But for everyday tasks, it's too complicated. It is not used in practice.
To represent code+data, consider [ContractState].
To represent sharding (fixedPrefixLength, formerly splitDepth), consider [AutoDeployAddress].

declarations.name: WalletVestingStorage

fields.name: seqno
fields.description: Replay-protection sequence number.

fields.name: subwalletId
fields.description: Wallet id, also called subwallet id.

fields.name: publicKey
fields.description: Stored Ed25519 public key used to verify external signed requests.

fields.name: whitelist
fields.description: Whitelist dictionary keyed by `int8 workchain + uint256 address_hash`; values are one-bit true markers.

fields.name: vesting
fields.description: Immutable vesting parameters stored as a single referenced cell.

declarations.description: Persistent vesting wallet state stored in the root data cell.

declarations.name: WalletVestingParameters

fields.name: vestingStartTime
fields.description: Unix timestamp at which proportional vesting starts.

fields.name: vestingTotalDuration
fields.description: Full vesting period in seconds.

fields.name: unlockPeriod
fields.description: Discrete unlock step in seconds.

fields.name: cliffDuration
fields.description: Initial cliff period in seconds.

fields.name: vestingTotalAmount
fields.description: Total locked Toncoin amount in nanotons.

fields.name: vestingSenderAddress
fields.description: Sender address that can top up, receive locked funds back, and append whitelist entries.

fields.name: ownerAddress
fields.description: Owner address allowed to initiate internal send requests.

declarations.description: Immutable vesting schedule and controlling addresses stored in `WalletVestingStorage.vesting`.

declarations.name: WalletVestingSend

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Caller-selected query id echoed in `WalletVestingSendResponse`.

fields.name: sendMode
fields.description: Send mode passed to `send_raw_message`; locked funds only allow mode `3`.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Raw outbound internal message cell loaded by reference and sent as-is.

declarations.description: Internal owner-authenticated request that sends one raw outbound message.

declarations.name: WalletVestingAddWhitelist

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Caller-selected query id echoed in `WalletVestingAddWhitelistResponse`.

fields.name: addresses
fields.description: Snake stream of `MsgAddress` values; each address is read inline, then the next cell ref if present.

declarations.description: Internal vesting-sender request that appends one or more whitelist addresses.

declarations.name: WalletVestingSignedExternal

fields.name: signature
fields.description: Ed25519 signature over subwalletId, validUntil, seqno, and outgoing tail.

fields.name: subwalletId
fields.description: Wallet id expected to match storage.subwalletId.

fields.name: validUntil
fields.description: Unix timestamp after which the request is expired.

fields.name: seqno
fields.description: Request sequence number expected to match storage.seqno.

fields.name: outgoing
fields.description: Raw tail that may contain one `sendMode:uint8 + ^Message` pair; other tails only affect seqno after valid auth.

declarations.description: External-in request authenticated by Ed25519 signature over the unsigned trailing payload.

declarations.name: WalletVestingSendResponse

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the owner send request.

declarations.description: Response emitted after an accepted owner send request.

declarations.name: WalletVestingAddWhitelistResponse

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the whitelist append request.

declarations.description: Response emitted after an accepted whitelist append request.

declarations.name: WalletVestingIncomingExternalMessage
declarations.description: External-in message body accepted by the vesting wallet.

declarations.name: GetVestingDataReply

fields.name: vestingStartTime
fields.description: Unix timestamp at which proportional vesting starts.

fields.name: vestingTotalDuration
fields.description: Full vesting period in seconds.

fields.name: unlockPeriod
fields.description: Discrete unlock step in seconds.

fields.name: cliffDuration
fields.description: Initial cliff period in seconds.

fields.name: vestingTotalAmount
fields.description: Total locked Toncoin amount in nanotons.

fields.name: vestingSenderAddress
fields.description: Sender address that can top up, receive locked funds back, and append whitelist entries.

fields.name: ownerAddress
fields.description: Owner address allowed to initiate internal send requests.

fields.name: whitelist
fields.description: Raw whitelist dictionary cell returned by source code; null means an empty dictionary.

declarations.description: Structured result returned by `get_vesting_data`.

declarations.name: WalletVestingWhitelistEntry

fields.name: workchain
fields.description: Workchain id from the packed whitelist dictionary key.

fields.name: address
fields.description: 256-bit address hash from the packed whitelist dictionary key.

get_methods.name: seqno
get_methods.description: Return the current replay-protection sequence number.

get_methods.name: get_subwallet_id
get_methods.description: Return the wallet id, equivalent to subwallet id.

get_methods.name: get_public_key
get_methods.description: Return the stored Ed25519 public key.

get_methods.name: get_vesting_data
get_methods.description: Return the immutable vesting parameters and raw whitelist dictionary.

get_methods.name: is_whitelisted
get_methods.description: Return whether an address is present in the whitelist dictionary.

get_methods.name: get_whitelist
get_methods.description: Return all whitelist entries as a TVM cons-list of `(workchain, address_hash)` pairs.

get_methods.name: get_locked_amount
get_methods.description: Return the amount, in nanotons, still locked at `atTime`.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.InvalidSeqno
thrown_errors.description: External request seqno does not match storage.seqno.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.InvalidSubwalletId
thrown_errors.description: External request wallet id does not match storage.subwalletId.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.InvalidSignature
thrown_errors.description: Ed25519 signature verification failed.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.ExpiredMessage
thrown_errors.description: External request validUntil is not greater than the current block time.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.SendModeNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Locked-fund send uses a mode other than `PAY_FEES_SEPARATELY + IGNORE_ERRORS`.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.NonBounceableNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Locked-fund whitelist send uses a non-bounceable outbound message.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.StateInitNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Locked-fund whitelist send includes StateInit.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.CommentNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Locked-fund whitelist send has a disallowed body opcode or comment shape.

thrown_errors.name: Errors.SymbolsNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Locked-fund whitelist text comment starts with a disallowed symbol.
